violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Deli -Ice chunks/build up at cases of food stored below walk in freezer fans.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Deli -Case of Hawaiian Rolls on floor in walk in freezer. *Corrected immediately.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Meat -Rack of wrapped precooked fajita meat stored below raw of raw beef and rack of raw sausage/hamburger in walk in freezer. -Price reduced beef, hamburger and hot dogs are stored at bottom display shelf below raw chicken shelf.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Deli -Cloths used as liners in utensil bins/drawers. -Cloth being used at liner below hot hold soup.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Deli -Some debris at bottom of wire utility cart. -Dust build up at lower vents of Deli cold display. Bakery -Residue at drawer surfaces of cupcake bins. Meat -Suet/residue at handle of hand soap dispenser.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Deli -Grease/residue build up at hood vents, specifically above fryers.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Deli Dust/debris at walk in cooler fans. Meat -Dust/debris at walk in cooler fans. -Dust/debris at meat room cooler fans. -Build up of debris under shelves and wrapping station in meat room. Produce -Some dust/debris at ceiling around walk in cooler fans.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. Deli -Holes in wall below 3 comp sink. -Peeling floor below dish pit. -Staining/debris at back splash of 3 comp sink. -Drain cover missing at 3 comp floor drain. Bakery -Hole in wall below/near right side of dish pit. -Drain cover missing at 3 comp floor drain. Meat -Concrete floor seal appears worn through/rough throughout department. Produce -Cracking/damaged/worn concrete in produce room.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
